notes: This Steam Version isn't required to play the game anyway, you can just boot it up on your main Browser.

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6900 XT (radeonsi, navi21, LLVM 18.1.8, DRM 3.59, 6.12.8-zen1-1-zen)
notes:
add MicrosoftEdgeWebview2Setup.exe as a non-steam game from where the game is installed.


change the compatibility to the same proton as the game (e.g. Proton Experimental) and run it to let Microsoft Edge Webview2 Runtime download and install. go back to where the game is installed and delte installscript.vdf file to skip running install script().


another way of doing it is to install MicrosoftEdgeWebview2Setup.exe using wine and setting this launch option to play the game through steam without proton but it also launches with a blank screen:

PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%
